hooks.command: cmd="$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty')"; msg='Blocked by CLAUDE.md / uv-validation skill: all Python goes through uv into a throwaway venv. Use: uv run script.py, or uv run --with <pkg> python ... for deps. Never invoke python/pip/pipx/virtualenv directly, and never uv pip install / uv sync / uv add -- validation deps stay ephemeral (no committed .venv or requirements.txt).'; nouv='uv is not installed, but this repo needs it for all Python (validation, the seasonal styler). Install it:  macOS/Linux: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh  |  Homebrew: brew install uv  |  Windows: powershell -c "irm https://astral.sh/uv/install.ps1 | iex". See the uv-validation skill / CLAUDE.md.'; case "$cmd" in 'uv '*|*' uv '*|*python*|*' pip '*|'pip '*) command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "$nouv" >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac; case "$cmd" in 'uv run '*|'uv tool '*) exit 0 ;; esac; case "$cmd" in *'uv pip install'*|*'uv sync'*|*'uv add'*|*virtualenv*|*'-m venv'*) echo "$msg" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; lead="$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | awk '{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++){if($i ~ /^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*=/)continue; print $i; exit}}')"; case "$lead" in python|python3|pip|pip3|pipx) echo "$msg" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; pkill -f 'http.server' 2>/dev/null; if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then for f in game.js data.js audio.js; do git diff --quiet -- "$f" 2>/dev/null && git diff --cached --quiet -- "$f" 2>/dev/null && continue; [ -f "$f" ] || continue; uv run --with esprima python -c "import esprima,sys; esprima.parseScript(open(sys.argv[1]).read())" "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo "[esprima] syntax error in $f -- run the uv-validation skill for details" >&2; done; fi; st="$(git status --short)"; if [ -n "$st" ]; then echo "git status --short (cruft-cleanup gate -- every line should be explainable by the task):" >&2; echo "$st" >&2; fi; exit 0
